### Post by Synth3t1c on 2007-07-15
Keep getting this issue:

i use xev to see what the buttons are for the scroll wheel, and it changes every restart of x.

and, for the life of me, i cant get the back/forward buttons to work.  the forward one acts as a right click.


please help!

### Post by dcrippen on 2008-01-13
I'm new to linux and ubuntu and I have been trying to figure this exact same thing out.
